title: Implement core.git pack with unit tests and golden files
description: Create internal/packs/core/git.go with 11 safe + 20 destructive patterns (push --force, reset --hard, checkout --, rebase, clean, branch -D, stash drop/clear, restore, reflog expire, gc --prune, filter-branch, refspec). Create git_test.go with per-pattern tests and reachability. Golden file entries (~60). Establish shared test helpers (cmd(), m()) for all pack tests.
